The system

Calm, credible, high-contrast.

The brand earns trust through legibility and restraint, not decoration. Signal Blue is the only locked colour.

Signal Blue

Poppins
Display and body — the shared family spine.
IBM Plex Mono · eyebrows & codes
The mark

The pixel double-X — the cluster lifted straight from the wordmark. No gradients, no shadows.

Ask about the method, accountability, ownership, or the work. I answer only from Maxxim's approved material — anything else, I'll point you to a human.
